checks.description: Guard against assuming fixed latency for edge case; the design must eventually produce a stable product after edge stimulus without requiring a specific cycle count.
checks.pass_condition: No fixed-cycle latency is assumed; mul_out must reach a stable, non-X value consistent with the arithmetic result after the edge stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge stimulus is applied to mul_a and mul_b.

checks.description: Observe that mul_out eventually reflects the product of mul_a and mul_b after a legal operation.
checks.pass_condition: mul_out stabilizes to a value equal to the arithmetic product of the driven inputs, after an unspecified but finite number of clock cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic stimulus is applied to mul_a and mul_b.
